cards.name: The Fool (The Fool)
cards.interpretation: A new beginning is waiting for you. Embrace the challenge without fear! This is a time of infinite possibilities.
cards.advice: Now is the time to start a new challenge. Follow where your heart leads.

cards.name: The Magician (The Magician)
cards.interpretation: You have the ability to achieve what you desire. All the tools are in place. Believe in yourself!
cards.advice: Make full use of your talents and abilities. Success is right around the corner.

cards.name: The High Priestess (The High Priestess)
cards.interpretation: Now is not the time for answers to reveal themselves. Wait a little longer and listen to your inner voice.
cards.advice: Trust your intuition. If you don't rush and wait for the right moment, the answer will come.

cards.name: The Empress (The Empress)
cards.interpretation: A rich and beautiful outcome awaits you. The energy of love and creation is overflowing!
cards.advice: Love and take care of yourself. Abundance begins within.

cards.name: The Emperor (The Emperor)
cards.interpretation: With firm will and leadership, you can achieve what you want. A stable foundation is in place.
cards.advice: Approach systematically and have confidence. You can lead the way.

cards.name: The Hierophant (The Hierophant)
cards.interpretation: Try following established methods or seek advice from someone you trust. Rather than deciding alone, it seems better to discuss together.
cards.advice: Seek advice from someone experienced. Proven methods will help.

cards.name: The Lovers (The Lovers)
cards.interpretation: Love and harmony energy are overflowing! The direction your heart is heading is right. A beautiful relationship is waiting for you.
cards.advice: Follow the voice of your heart. A true connection will be made.

cards.name: The Chariot (The Chariot)
cards.interpretation: With strong will and drive, you can seize victory! Move forward. You have the strength to overcome obstacles.
cards.advice: Don't waver — rush toward your goal. Victory awaits.

cards.name: Strength (Strength)
cards.interpretation: There is a strong power within you. If you handle the situation in a gentle way, you can get the results you want.
cards.advice: Be patient and approach with gentleness. True strength lies within.

cards.name: The Hermit (The Hermit)
cards.interpretation: You need time alone right now. Focus inward rather than outward and think things through. The time is not yet ripe.
cards.advice: Don't rush — look back at yourself. You can find true answers in solitude.

cards.name: Wheel of Fortune (Wheel of Fortune)
cards.interpretation: The wheel of fortune is turning in your favor! Good changes are coming your way. Grab that luck!
cards.advice: Don't be afraid of change. A great opportunity is coming your way.

cards.name: Justice (Justice)
cards.interpretation: Look at the situation fairly. The truth will emerge and the right outcome will follow. Caution is needed now.
cards.advice: Judge with reason rather than emotion. Looking with a fair eye reveals the answer.

cards.name: The Hanged Man (The Hanged Man)
cards.interpretation: Now is a time for waiting rather than action. If you change your perspective, you'll see something new. Pause for a moment.
cards.advice: Look at the situation from a different angle. Sometimes waiting is the best course.

cards.name: Death (Death)
cards.interpretation: One chapter is ending and a new beginning is arriving. If you embrace change, new possibilities will open up.
cards.advice: Let go of the past. An ending is a new beginning.

cards.name: Temperance (Temperance)
cards.interpretation: A balanced approach will bring success. If you move forward harmoniously without rushing, good results await.
cards.advice: Avoid extremes and walk the middle path. Balance creates beautiful results.

cards.name: The Devil (The Devil)
cards.interpretation: There is a risk of being too obsessed with something or falling into temptation. It would be best to step back and look at the situation objectively now.
cards.advice: Break free from obsession. True choice is possible when you are free.

cards.name: The Tower (The Tower)
cards.interpretation: Unexpected changes or chaos may arrive. Rather than acting right away, it's better to wait for the situation to stabilize.
cards.advice: Prepare for sudden change. What crumbles is making space for something better.

cards.name: The Star (The Star)
cards.interpretation: The star of hope is shining! Move toward your dreams. A beautiful future is waiting for you.
cards.advice: Don't lose hope. A bright future is waiting, just like a star.

cards.name: The Moon (The Moon)
cards.interpretation: Everything is unclear and confusing right now. There may be misconceptions or misunderstandings, so confirm carefully and act cautiously.
cards.advice: Don't be deceived by fear and illusion. Explore slowly to find the truth.

cards.name: The Sun (The Sun)
cards.interpretation: The best energy is flowing! Brilliant success and happiness are waiting. Move forward with confidence!
cards.advice: Smile wide and move forward. Bright success like the sun is with you.

cards.name: Judgement (Judgement)
cards.interpretation: Look back at the choices you've made so far. Before making a decision, sufficient reflection and reevaluation are needed.
cards.advice: Make decisions based on lessons from the past. Listen to your inner voice.

cards.name: The World (The World)
cards.interpretation: Everything is coming together perfectly! The energy of completion and achievement is overflowing. Your efforts will bear fruit.
cards.advice: It's time to wrap things up. Enjoy the joy of completion.
